forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the Barossa Valley, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the north early this evening. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the Barossa Valley in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog on the eastern slopes. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower in the north, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm early this evening. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon then tending southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Mostly clear. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the south in the early morning. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 27.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Sunny. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm early this evening. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Partly cloudy. The chance of a thunderstorm early this evening. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog in the southwest. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely later this evening. The chance of a thunderstorm early this evening. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the west in the early morning. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers on and east of the ranges, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Hawker early this evening. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers on and east of the ranges, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower north of Hawker in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 27.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 5:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloud clearing. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog west of Ceduna. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Partly cloudy. The chance of a thunderstorm early this evening. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog near the west coast. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloud clearing. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:00am to 5:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 10 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the far west. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower north of Marla, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers east of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Leigh Creek. Thunderstorms possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding near the eastern border. Winds southeast to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the evening.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 10 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Leigh Creek in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.
Sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 33.
